isi.lyrics:
Lyric Kevin Oh - Afterglow (From Gold Land Original Soundtrack)

Romanization

(Verse 1)
Another day, another hour,
free falling in my mind
I rewind all of the reasons for leaving

(Pre-chorus 1)
When everyone around me’s changing,
everyone but me
All the things I thought I could be
are out of reach

(Chorus 1)
I leave it all behind
As you fall in line
I’m not expecting any light at your door
There’s nothing left, just the pieces
of everything we could’ve been before
evermore
I don’t feel it like I used to
anymore

(Verse 2)
You could find me in the dark
still calling through the night
I leave behind all of the seasons I’ve dreamed of

(Pre-chorus 2)
But the water’s rising over
Everything I’ve known
Drifting out you’re all alone,
on your own

(Chorus 2)
So leave it all behind
As you fall in line
I’m not expecting any light at your door
There’s nothing left, just the pieces
of everything we could’ve been before
evermore
I don’t feel it like I used to
anymore

(Bridge)
Still holding onto all your memories,
knowing how things used to be

(Chorus 3)
I’ll leave it all behind
No need for your goodbyes
There’s nothing left,
it’s brittle and bones
Every breath,
every teardrop I made will disappear and turn to dust
All I was
fades away
I’ll finally say it
and let go
into the afterglow

아무 이유 없이 바빴던 반복된 아침들
